allow: Bash(cd C:/apps/repo/carpool && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(cd C:/apps/repo/carpool && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(cd C:/apps/repo/carpool && npx convex dev --once 2>&1 | tail -5 && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -10)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Last goal number:'''', max\(g[''''number''''] for g in goals\)\); print\(''''Active/Queued:'''', [\(g[''''number''''], g[''''status''''], g[''''title'''']\) for g in goals if g[''''status''''] in [''''ACTIVE'''',''''QUEUED'''',''''WORKING'''']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; msgs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''[{m[""author""]}]: {m[""body""]}''''\) for m in msgs[-10:]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; msgs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''[{m[""author""]}]: {m[""body""]}''''\) for m in msgs[-5:]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); open_goals=[g for g in goals if g[''''status''''] not in \(''''DONE'''',''''CANCELLED''''\)]; print\(json.dumps\(open_goals, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); done=[g for g in goals if g[''''status'''']==''''DONE'''']; print\(f''''Total goals: {len\(goals\)}, DONE: {len\(done\)}, latest number: {max\(g[""number""] for g in goals\)}''''\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; msgs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''[{m[""author""]}] {m[""body""][:120]}''''\) for m in msgs[-20:]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); recent=[g for g in goals if g[''''number''''] >= 40]; [print\(f''''Goal {g[""number""]}: [{g[""status""]}] {g[""title""]}''''\) for g in sorted\(recent, key=lambda x: x[''''number'''']\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''Goal {g[""number""]}: {g[""title""]}''''\) for g in sorted\(goals, key=lambda x: x[''''number'''']\)[:20]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); last=sorted\(goals, key=lambda x: x[''''number'''']\)[-1]; print\(f''''Last goal: #{last[""number""]} — {last[""title""]} [{last[""status""]}]''''\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); last=[g for g in goals if g[''''number'''']==55][0]; print\(last[''''_id'''']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''Goal #{g[""number""]}: {g[""title""]} | {g[""status""]} | assignee: {g.get\(""assignee"",""?""\)} | worker: {g.get\(""worker"",""-""\)}''''\) for g in goals]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); active=[g for g in goals if g[''''status''''] not in \(''''DONE'''',\)]; [print\(f''''Goal #{g[""number""]}: {g[""title""]} | {g[""status""]} | {g.get\(""assignee"",""?""\)}''''\) for g in active]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); g=[x for x in goals if x[''''number'''']==8][0]; print\(f''''Goal #{g[""number""]}: {g[""title""]} | {g[""status""]} | assignee: {g.get\(""assignee"",""?""\)}''''\)")
